content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be intentionally designed to leverage the inherent working memory capacity limits that constrain agent reasoning, rather than just aiming to eliminate those limits. This means active learning can be tuned to prioritize querying new data and consolidating unprocessed episodic memory traces exactly when the agent’s working memory hits its bottleneck during complex reasoning.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
